name: up_ethanol_register_x_news

register_aggregates.note: UP distillery 5(g) proposals in the PARIVESH EC register (all years); live = granted + in-process

up_context: UP is India's No.1 ethanol state: ~236-250 crore litres/yr capacity of India's ~1,990 crore litres (Nov-2025); output up from 42.7 crore litres (2016-17) to 187.8 crore litres (ESY 2025-26 through Jan); ~74 operational distilleries; ~50 crore litres of capacity ADDED in 2025 alone. The wave is grain-based (maize/broken rice) on DFPD interest subvention, layered on the west-UP molasses belt; Gorakhpur GIDA is the emerging grain-ethanol cluster.
